name: R5MoneyElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Money to FHIR R4 Money
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Money to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `Money.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Money.value` as `Equivalent`.
Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books).

Element `Money.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Money.value` as `Equivalent`.
Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books).
Element `Money.currency` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Money.currency` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Money.currency` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Money.currency` as `Equivalent`.
